name: Barbecued Loin-Back Ribs
recipeIngredient: 3-4 lbs loin back ribs or meaty spareribs, sliced into 2 strips about 4 inches wide
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, cook onion in hot oil until tender but not brown. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato sauce, brown sugar, water, lemon juice, bottled steak sauce, salt, and pepper). Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes or until the sauce reaches a nice consistency.
2. Season the ribs with salt and pepper.
3. Arrange the ribs in an accordion style on the spit, securing them with holding forks.
4. Place a drip pan under the ribs.
5. Attach the spit to the motor and lower it into the BBQ hood.
6. Rotate the ribs over slow coals for 1 hour or until the meat is well done.
7. For the last 30 minutes of cooking, brush the ribs frequently with sauce and add dampened wood (hickory) chunks to the coals for smoke flavor.
